male.reason: Women's Hormonal Health content (PCOS, menstrual cycle, estrogen protocols) is not applicable for male profiles.

female.reason: Men's Performance Pack (testosterone optimization, male-specific protocols) is not applicable for female profiles.

other.reason: All addons available for non-binary profiles.

non-binary.reason: All addons available for non-binary profiles.

deprecated_addons.addon_products: Folded into Pro+ tier (premium_blueprint, coaching_blueprint, subscription_all_access). Cannot be purchased directly.
deprecated_addons.addon_family: Replaced by addon_family_2 / addon_family_4. Legacy id retained for historic-order resolution only.

addon_dna.name: DNA & Genetics Pack
addon_dna.description: Gene-to-action decision engine (MTHFR, CYP1A2, ACTN3, FTO)

addon_family_2.name: Family Plan — 2 Reports
addon_family_2.description: Two personalized reports with shared-meal modifier table

addon_family_4.name: Family Plan — 4 Reports
addon_family_4.description: Four personalized reports with shared-meal modifier table

addon_women_hormone.name: Women's Hormonal Health
addon_women_hormone.description: PCOS, menstrual cycle nutrition, hormonal balance (auto-included for PCOS/thyroid/perimenopausal)

addon_lab_interpretation.name: Quarterly Lab-Test Interpretation
addon_lab_interpretation.description: Quarterly lab panel personalized to your profile, each marker mapped to a plan adjustment

validation_rules.message: Women's Hormonal Health add-on cannot be purchased for a male profile.
Men's Performance Pack add-on cannot be purchased for a female profile.
Product Recommendations is no longer sold separately — it is included in Personalized Pro+ and above.
Family Wellness Plan has been replaced by Family Plan — 2 Reports and Family Plan — 4 Reports.
